---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a framework enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem
What gap in the framework does this fill?

### Proposed approach
How should it work? Be concrete — function signatures, config keys, expected behavior.

### Alternatives considered
What else did you look at and why is the proposed approach better?

### Backward compatibility
Does this break any existing config? Migration plan?
